title: Anora
logline: A young sex worker from Brooklyn thinks she's found her fairy tale when she marries the son of a Russian oligarch, but when his parents arrive to annul the marriage, her dream becomes a surreal nightmare.
antagonistOrConflict: The Zakharov family's wealth and power, which threatens to erase Ani's brief escape from her circumstances
themes: The illusion of the American Dream

actBreaks.description: Ivan's impulsive Vegas marriage proposal transforms Ani's transactional relationship into what she believes is a fairy tale romance.

validation.ruling: Scene 87 (the wedding chapel scene where Ani and Ivan get married) is a perfect act break - an irreversible decision that fundamentally changes the story's direction and forces Ani into a completely new situation with higher stakes.

actBreaks.description: Garnik and Igor arrive at the mansion, shattering Ani's brief fantasy and beginning her captivity as they hunt for the fled Ivan.

validation.ruling: Scene 74 (taking a private jet to Vegas) is setup, not a climactic turning point. Scene 115 (Ani being driven away in the Escalade after losing the mansion confrontation) represents the end of Act 2 - her final defeat in the physical battle, forcing her into the final act where she must use legal means.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script operates as a three-act fairy tale inversion, where the Cinderella story collapses into brutal reality. Act I establishes Ani's working-class hustle and introduces Ivan as her ticket out. The Las Vegas marriage sequence functions as a compressed fairy tale climax that would normally end the story. Act II becomes an extended nightmare as Ani discovers the cost of marrying into oligarch money—she becomes a captive in her own supposed fairy tale. The script's genius lies in how it sustains tension through Ani's sheer force of will and mouth, turning what could be a victim narrative into a showcase of working-class resilience. Act III strips away all illusions, showing both Ani and the audience that some class barriers are insurmountable, no matter how much fight you have in you.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The opening club sequence (scenes 1-22) uses rapid-fire vignettes to establish Ani's world and work ethic. The pacing shifts dramatically during the Vegas sequence (scenes 47-59), compressing a whirlwind romance into quick montage beats that mirror the intoxicating unreality of the experience. Once Garnik arrives (scene 74), the pacing becomes relentless and claustrophobic, with extended real-time sequences of Ani's captivity and the search for Ivan stretching across nearly 50 scenes, creating an exhausting endurance test that mirrors Ani's experience.

incitingIncident.description: Post-sex, Ivan reveals he must return to Russia to work for his father, then jokingly suggests marrying an American to stay, including Ani.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: 57 INT. CAESAR’S PALACE - PENTHOUSE - BEDROOM - MINUTES LATER. 57 57

validation.ruling: Scene 17 is just Ani meeting Ivan at work - ordinary for a stripper. Scene 86 (post-sex conversation where Ivan reveals he must return to Russia and jokingly suggests marrying an American to stay) is the true inciting incident that shatters Ani's status quo by introducing the marriage possibility that drives the entire story forward.

midpoint.description: Ivan tries to push the door closed but Garnik forces his foot in the door jam, leading to a struggle as Garnik reveals Ivan's father sent them and asks about a marriage.

validation.ruling: Scene 87 is the wedding itself, but the midpoint should be later in the script around 55-83pp. Scene 106 (the massive 11-page confrontation scene at the mansion where Ani fights desperately against the men trying to annul her marriage) represents her shift from reactive to proactive - she cannot return to her old life and must fight for her marriage with everything she has.

climax.description: The crew arrives at Tatiana's Grill, a Brighton Beach restaurant.

validation.ruling: Scene 173 is just a brief moment searching for Ivan. Scene 160 (the courthouse scene where Ani faces the final legal proceedings) represents the climactic confrontation where the main story question of her marriage's validity is resolved at the highest stakes.

scenes.summary: Garnik runs after Ivan while Igor blocks Ani from following, grabbing her shoulder and trying to push her toward the couch as she swings at him.

scenes.heading: 92 INT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - CONTINUOUS 92 92
scenes.summary: Ivan runs through the open gate while Garnik chases but slips on ice and falls.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS 93 93
scenes.summary: Ani strikes Igor with her left hand, her wedding ring cutting his cheek and drawing first blood as she grabs a menorah and throws it at him.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 94 94
scenes.summary: Toros hears Ani screaming through his car speakers and asks what's happening.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 95 95
scenes.summary: Ani fights Igor violently, causing them to fall against furniture and shatter a red lamp and other items across the marble floor.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 96 96
scenes.summary: Toros drives frantically while hearing the screaming and commotion, yelling for them to stop killing her.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. MANSION/STREET - DAY 97 97
scenes.summary: Garnik chases Ivan down the street but gives up and returns, encountering the security guard who casually asks about Ivan's tantrum.

scenes.heading: 98 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - DAY 98 98
scenes.summary: Igor pins Ani on the couch and ties her wrists with a phone cord while she screams and struggles, as Garnik enters asking what happened.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 99 99
scenes.summary: Toros screams at his radio while driving distracted and nearly hits a child in the street, slamming on his brakes.

scenes.heading: 100 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 100 100
scenes.summary: Igor asks Garnik to tie Ani's legs with a cord, but she kicks Garnik in the face, breaking his nose and sending him crashing through the glass coffee table.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A101
scenes.summary: Garnik stumbles into the kitchen and opens the freezer looking for ice.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS B101
scenes.summary: Ani tells Igor she won't fight or run and asks him to let her go because he's hurting her, but Igor refuses.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS C101
scenes.summary: Garnik takes a bag of frozen dumplings from the freezer since he can't find ice.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS D101
scenes.summary: Ani threatens Igor with the security cameras and warns him he's in trouble, but Igor doesn't reply.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 101 101
scenes.summary: Toros lays on his car horn and pounds the steering wheel in frustration while speeding down the Belt.

scenes.heading: 102 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 102 102
scenes.summary: Igor tells Ani that Ivan left her, while Garnik returns with the dumpling bag on his face and curses at Ani for breaking his nose.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT. MANSION - SECURITY GATE - DAY 104 104
scenes.summary: Toros speeds up to the security gate and screams at the guard to open it immediately.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 105 105
scenes.summary: Ani verbally attacks Igor, calling him psychotic and accusing him of getting aroused, while he denies enjoying the situation.

scenes.heading: 106 EXT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - DAY 106 106
scenes.summary: Toros exits his Escalade and darts to the front door, scanning his card to enter.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. MANSION - FIRST FLOOR - DAY 107 107
scenes.summary: Toros enters the destroyed mansion to find Garnik with the dumpling bag on his face, Igor restraining Ani on the couch, and no Ivan present, leading to total shock as he demands explanations.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros arrives to discover the full scope of the disaster - Ivan has fled and Ani is being forcibly restrained, escalating the crisis

scenes.heading: 108 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - MOMENTS LATER 108 108
scenes.summary: Toros smokes and talks on his phone outside while threatening to cut ties with a law firm if they don't get them in front of a judge before the family lands at noon.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 109 109
scenes.summary: Ani sits bound and gagged on the couch while Igor guards the door and apologizes, telling her to do what they say for easier treatment.

scenes.heading: 110 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - DAY 110 110
scenes.summary: Toros finishes his phone call arranging a 9 AM meeting, then looks at Ani through the glass and decides it's time to break her.

scenes.heading: 111 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - MOMENTS LATER 111 111
scenes.summary: Toros removes Ani's gag and offers her $10,000 to agree to annul the marriage, claiming Ivan betrayed her with a fake green card marriage.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros makes his first serious attempt to resolve the situation through negotiation, revealing his strategy to convince Ani the marriage was fake

scenes.heading: 112 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Ani removes her false eyelashes, washes her face in the bathroom, and finds Igor waiting outside when she opens the door, asking for privacy to change.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. MANSION - FRONT STEPS/DRIVEWAY - DAY 113 113
scenes.summary: Ani and the crew exit the mansion, with Toros checking her passport and noting her legal name is Anora while Igor listens, as cleaning staff arrive in the background.

scenes.heading: 114 EXT. MANSION/INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY - CONTINUOUS 114 114
scenes.summary: Igor gets in the backseat with Ani despite her protests about the "psychopath," while Toros pays cleaners outside and they drive away from the mansion.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 115 115
scenes.summary: In the car, they discuss finding Ivan at a hangout spot while Garnik complains about needing hospital care for his concussion, and Igor apologizes to Ani for the earlier violence.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRIGHTWATER - DAY A116
scenes.summary: Igor exits a building and gives Garnik three pills, which Garnik immediately takes all at once to Igor's surprise, before they drive off.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - DAY 116 116
scenes.summary: The Escalade encounters NYPD street barricades blocking their path, forcing Toros to park and the crew to exit and walk.

scenes.heading: 117 OMITTED 117 117
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 118 EXT. CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - DAY 118 118
scenes.summary: The crew walks onto the Coney Island boardwalk and heads toward the vape shop.

scenes.heading: 119 INT. VAPE SHOP - DAY 119 119
scenes.summary: At the vape shop, Crystal and Tom refuse to help locate Ivan and become suspicious of Ani's companions, leading to a tense confrontation where Tom threatens to call police and hangs up when Crystal tries calling Ivan.

scenes.heading: 120 EXT. BOARDWALK - MOMENTS LATER 120 120
scenes.summary: The crew exits onto the boardwalk after the confrontation, with Ani upset about being hung up on, and Toros decides they'll walk to the next location rather than drive.

scenes.heading: 121 EXT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 121 121
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Tatiana's Grill, a Brighton Beach restaurant.

scenes.heading: 122 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 122 122
scenes.summary: The crew enters the restaurant and storms toward the kitchen after spotting Aleks, causing a scene among the dining patrons.

scenes.heading: 123 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - DAY - CONTINUOUS 123 123
scenes.summary: In the kitchen, Aleks is confused and overwhelmed as Toros demands he call Ivan, then snatches the phone when the call goes to voicemail, realizing Ivan is avoiding them.

scenes.heading: 124 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - MAIN AREA - CONTINUOUS 124 124
scenes.summary: Toros grabs the microphone from a performer and disrupts the entire restaurant, asking customers in English and Russian if they've seen Ivan while showing them a photo.

scenes.heading: INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A125
scenes.summary: Back in the kitchen, Aleks reveals that Dasha left for the Bahamas with another man after being inspired by Ivan's proposal to Ani, while Ani ignores his romantic rambling.

scenes.heading: 125 EXT. BOARDWALK - LATE AFTERNOON 125 125
scenes.summary: The crew exits into cold winds as Toros curses their failure, with Ani refusing to walk back and Garnik complaining about his head injury, but Toros forces them to continue.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - MINUTES LATER 126 126
scenes.summary: As they march through the cold, Igor offers Ani a red scarf, but she becomes suspicious and accusatory about why he brought it, suspecting it was meant to gag her.

scenes.heading: 127 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - LATER 127 127
scenes.summary: The crew discovers their Escalade being towed away, leading to Toros frantically fighting the tow truck driver and ultimately driving off with the car still partially attached to the truck.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. ESCALADE - CONTINUOUS 128 128
scenes.summary: Toros laughs triumphantly while driving recklessly under subway tracks, declaring nothing will stop him from finding Ivan even if it kills someone.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. BELT PARKWAY - DUSK 129 129
scenes.summary: The Escalade speeds along the Belt Parkway at sunset as Toros vows to search all night for Ivan.

scenes.heading: 130 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH RESTAURANTS - NIGHT 130 130
scenes.summary: A montage shows the crew searching multiple Brighton Beach restaurants and bars, showing Ivan's photo to staff and customers with no success.

scenes.heading: 131 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 131 131
scenes.summary: While driving, Igor touches Ani's coat and she corrects him that it's expensive sable, not mink, and tells him not to touch it again.

scenes.heading: 132 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH - NIGHT 132 132
scenes.summary: The crew continues hitting Russian restaurants, with one manager reporting Ivan was there an hour earlier, giving Toros hope they're closing in.

scenes.heading: INT. RUSSIAN BATH HOUSE - NIGHT A133
scenes.summary: At a Russian bath house, after showing Ivan's photo yields no results, Ani suggests he might be at gaming establishments.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani provides the key insight that redirects their search strategy toward gaming venues

scenes.heading: 133 OMITTED 133 133
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 134 OMITTED 134 134
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 135 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND - NIGHT 135 135
scenes.summary: The crew searches an internet cafe and billiards hall with no luck, while Garnik waits in the car becoming increasingly impaired.

scenes.heading: 136 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 136 136
scenes.summary: Garnik suddenly vomits violently in the moving car, causing Toros to slam the brakes and creating chaos with other vehicles honking and swerving.

scenes.heading: 138 EXT. BROOKLYN GAS STATION - NIGHT 138 138
scenes.summary: At a gas station, Toros angrily cleans vomit while Igor explains Garnik's concussion caused it, and Toros yells at Ani and Igor for smoking near the gas pumps.

scenes.heading: 139 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 139 139
scenes.summary: In the cleaned car with everyone exhausted and Garnik sick, Toros asks Ani to take them to every club she and Ivan visited together.

scenes.heading: 140 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH - VARIOUS CLUBS - NIGHT 140 140
scenes.summary: The crew searches multiple clubs where bartenders and bouncers report Ivan was recently there but they keep missing him by minutes, realizing he's on a drinking bender.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. DINER - BROOKLYN - NIGHT 141 141
scenes.summary: Late at night in a diner, exhausted Toros breaks down saying he's fucked with only six hours until City Hall, while the crew is tired and Garnik is heavily medicated.

scenes.heading: 142 INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN ROOM - NIGHT 142 142
scenes.summary: Ivan arrives drunk at Headquarters wearing sunglasses, walking down the hallway as Diamond recognizes him and alerts Jenny.

scenes.heading: 143 INT. DINER - NIGHT 143 143
scenes.summary: At the diner, Toros stands lecturing about the entitled younger generation while the crew sits exhausted at their table.

scenes.heading: 144 INT. HEADQUARTERS - LOCKER ROOM - NIGHT 144 144
scenes.summary: In the Headquarters locker room, Diamond excitedly tells other dancers that Ani's billionaire husband just arrived looking for action, suggesting their marriage is failing.

scenes.heading: 145 INT. DINER - NIGHT 145 145
scenes.summary: As Toros continues his generational rant at the diner, Ani suddenly shouts that Ivan is at Headquarters after receiving a text message.
scenes.turningPointNote: The breakthrough moment - they finally locate Ivan after hours of fruitless searching

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT A146
scenes.summary: At Headquarters, drunk Ivan drinks shots with two girls at the bar as Diamond approaches and pushes her way next to him.

scenes.heading: 146 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 146 146
scenes.summary: Diamond grinds on Ivan's lap during a lap dance, confirming his identity as "Vanya" while he smiles broadly.

scenes.heading: 147 EXT. DINER - NIGHT 147 147
scenes.summary: The crew rushes across the diner parking lot to their car, with Ani noting ketchup stained her sable coat.

scenes.heading: 148 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 148 148
scenes.summary: In the Escalade, Ani complains about the lingering vomit smell as they race toward Headquarters.

scenes.heading: 149 EXT. BQE - NIGHT 149 149
scenes.summary: The Escalade speeds through the night on the BQE highway.

scenes.heading: 150 INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT 150 150
scenes.summary: Ivan continues the lap dance while throwing down hundreds of dollars, with Diamond suggesting they move to a private room upstairs.

scenes.heading: 151 EXT. BROOKLYN BATTERY TUNNEL - NIGHT 151 151
scenes.summary: The crew drives through the Brooklyn Battery Tunnel approaching their destination.

scenes.heading: 152 EXT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 152 152
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Headquarters and rushes inside the building.

scenes.heading: 153 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 153 153
scenes.summary: Inside Headquarters, Lulu tells Ani that Ivan is upstairs in a private room with Diamond, causing Ani to storm upstairs with the crew following as other dancers recognize her.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS PRIVATE ROOM - CONTINUOUS A154
scenes.summary: The crew bursts into multiple wrong private rooms before finding Ivan with Diamond, leading to a confrontation where drunk Ivan dismisses Ani's explanations about being tied up and gagged, laughing at her distress.
scenes.turningPointNote: The devastating confrontation where Ivan shows complete indifference to Ani's suffering and their marriage

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS B154
scenes.summary: Jenny hurries through the kitchen to alert someone about the disturbance.

scenes.heading: 154 INT. HEADQUARTERS - OFFICE - CONTINUOUS 154 154
scenes.summary: Jenny informs Jimmy that "Russian Ani" is causing a scene with three men in the club.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM / THROUGH CLUB - CONTINUOUS 155.1
scenes.summary: Toros drags Ivan out by the collar while Ani desperately tries to remind Ivan of their love, but Diamond follows them hurling insults about Ani's failed marriage.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - STAIRS - CONTINUOUS 155.2
scenes.summary: On the stairs, Diamond continues taunting Ani, revealing Ivan told her he's returning to Russia and just wanted "one last bang," while Garnik tries to defend Ani.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN FLOOR / FRONT ENTRANCE - CONTINUOUS 155.3
scenes.summary: As they near the exit, Diamond's final taunt about calling the marriage's failure "two weeks on the fucking nose" causes Ani to snap and attack her, starting a full brawl with everyone trying to intervene.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani's complete breakdown and violent response to having her humiliation laid bare

scenes.heading: EXT. HEADQUARTERS - 552 W. 38TH ST. - NIGHT A156
scenes.summary: Toros shoves Ivan into the back seat of the Escalade between Garnik and Igor, then pushes Ani into the front seat.

scenes.heading: INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS B156
scenes.summary: Ani desperately tries to reason with an unresponsive Ivan in the Escalade while Toros drives them to the courthouse, revealing that Igor discovers Ivan is passed out and can't hear her pleas.

scenes.heading: 156 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - NIGHT 156 156
scenes.summary: The Escalade parks in front of the courthouse at night and Toros settles back to wait while Ani stares lost out the window.

scenes.heading: 157 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - MORNING 157 157
scenes.summary: Morning arrives at the courthouse and Toros wakes everyone except Ivan, while Ani tells the still-intoxicated Ivan that she'll handle the situation.

scenes.heading: 158 EXT. COURTHOUSE - DAY 158 158
scenes.summary: Outside the courthouse, Toros leaves Garnik in the Escalade with strict instructions while family lawyer Michael Sharnov greets them and tries unsuccessfully to get Ivan's attention.

scenes.heading: 159 INT. COURTHOUSE - ROTUNDA - DAY 159 159
scenes.summary: In the courthouse rotunda, Sharnov expresses concern about Ivan's intoxicated state while Toros threatens his employment with the Zakharov family to force compliance.

scenes.heading: 160 INT. COURTHOUSE - COURTROOM - LATER 160 160
scenes.summary: In the courtroom, Ani loudly interrupts the annulment proceedings by cursing and declaring that she and Ivan do not consent, prompting the judge to threaten disorderly conduct charges.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani makes her first major stand against the annulment in court, disrupting the legal proceedings

scenes.heading: 161 OMITTED 161 161
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 162 EXT. COURTHOUSE - STEPS - DAY 162 162
scenes.summary: On the courthouse steps, Toros has a breakdown upon learning they got married in Vegas, weeping and fearing a heart attack as Ivan's parents are about to arrive.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Vegas marriage revelation creates a major legal obstacle that sends Toros into crisis mode

scenes.heading: EXT. TORO’S ESCALADE - DAY A163
scenes.summary: Toros violently pulls Garnik from the Escalade and tells him the Vegas marriage has complicated everything before the crew piles in and drives away.

scenes.heading: 163 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 163 163
scenes.summary: They drive in tense silence with Toros crying until Ivan suddenly vomits on himself, causing Igor and Garnik to freak out while Toros remains indifferent.

scenes.heading: 164 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - DAY 164 164
scenes.summary: The Escalade drives onto private airport property and parks in front of the hangar entrance.

scenes.heading: 165 OMITTED 165 165
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 166 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 166 166
scenes.summary: The Zakharov private jet lands and Toros greets Galina and Nikolai on the tarmac, nervously telling Nikolai he has more bad news to deliver.

scenes.heading: 167 INT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TERMINAL - DAY 167 167
scenes.summary: Galina storms into the airport terminal and confronts the drunk, vomit-stained Ivan in Russian, expressing disgust and embarrassment at his condition while Ani slowly approaches.

scenes.heading: 168 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 168 168
scenes.summary: Galina drags Ivan toward the plane at a swift pace while berating everyone and threatening Toros's job, until Ani calls out and Ivan finally turns to confirm they're getting divorced.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan directly confirms the divorce to Ani's face, marking the moment her marriage officially ends

scenes.heading: INT. PLANE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ivan boards the plane and takes his seat while Galina asks where Ani is.

scenes.heading: EXT. TARMAC - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Galina descends the plane steps and orders Ani to board, but Ani threatens to sue for half of everything since they have no prenup, prompting Galina to threaten to destroy Ani and her family's lives.
scenes.turningPointNote: Galina makes explicit threats against Ani and her family, escalating the conflict to a dangerous level

scenes.heading: 169 INT. GULFSTREAM G650 - DAY 169 169
scenes.summary: Mid-flight on the lavish private jet, the exhausted crew sits separately while Ivan's parents continue reprimanding him, and Igor pours vodka shots for himself and Ani.

scenes.heading: 170 EXT. AIRPORT - LAS VEGAS - LATE MORNING 170 170
scenes.summary: The group gets into two black SUVs on the Las Vegas airport tarmac.

scenes.heading: 171 I/E. SUV - DAY 171 171
scenes.summary: They drive through Las Vegas in the SUVs.

scenes.heading: 172 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - PARKING LOT - DAY 172 172
scenes.summary: The SUVs pull into the parking lot and park in front of a rapid divorce center.

scenes.heading: 173 INT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 173 173
scenes.summary: Inside the cramped divorce center, Ivan signs the annulment papers without hesitation while Igor suggests Ivan should apologize to Ani, but Galina refuses to allow any apology.
scenes.turningPointNote: The annulment is officially signed, legally ending Ani and Ivan's marriage

scenes.heading: 174 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 174 174
scenes.summary: Outside the divorce center, Ani puts on designer sunglasses while Toros gives Igor instructions and money to take her back, telling her she must leave the house by morning.

scenes.heading: 175 I/E. SUV - DAY 175 175
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor drive through Las Vegas to the airport in complete silence.

scenes.heading: 176 INT. COMMERCIAL AIRPLANE - DAY 176 176
scenes.summary: On a cramped domestic flight, Ani sleeps while a baby cries and Igor covers her with his jacket as the captain announces landing preparations.

scenes.heading: 177 EXT. LAGUARDIA AIRPORT - CURB - DUSK 177 177
scenes.summary: They take a taxi from LaGuardia Airport at sunset.

scenes.heading: 178 INT. MANSION - MASTER BATHROOM - NIGHT 178 178
scenes.summary: Ani takes a shower in the mansion's master bathroom and looks around the gorgeous space, acknowledging it was nice while it lasted.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - NIGHT 178A
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor smoke a blunt together in the mansion's living room, where she learns it was Igor's 30th birthday yesterday and they have a crude but friendly conversation about their names and meanings.

scenes.heading: 180 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - NEXT MORNING 180 180
scenes.summary: Ani wakes up in the master bedroom to see snow falling outside, then packs her belongings including clothes, photo frames, and toiletries.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - LATER A181
scenes.summary: Igor slowly awakens on the couch and sees the falling snow outside.

scenes.heading: 181 INT. MANSION - FOYER/DOORWAY - LATER 181 181
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor leave the mansion with her three large pieces of luggage, opening the door to see it's snowing.

scenes.heading: 182 EXT. BANK - DAY - LATER 182 182
scenes.summary: Igor and Ani complete the money transfer with a bank teller while snow continues to fall outside.

scenes.heading: 183 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/INT. IGOR’S CAR - DAY 183 183
scenes.summary: Parked in front of Ani's apartment in heavy snow, Igor secretly gives Ani back the ring she cut his face with, then brings her luggage to the porch before returning to share cigarettes in the car.

scenes.heading: 184 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/BROOKLYN STREET - DAY 184 184
scenes.summary: Snow continues to fall around the idling car on the Brooklyn street as the credits roll.
